description: Legal document, in which Thāmira bt. Avraham appoints Avraham b. Shelomo as her agent for suing Hiba b. Bishr, debtor of her late father, since she and her minor sister were the only legal heirs. Dated Wednesday, 26th Adar II 4848 AM (= Spring 1088 CE). Location: Alexandria. Written and signed by the cantor Mawhūb b. Aharon the cantor and Tamām b. Nissim; signatures: the Nasi David b. Daniel ha-Nasi; ʿEli ha-Kohen b. Yaḥyā, the cantor Hillel b. ʿEli. (Information from CUDL; see also Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי: ת'אמירה בת אברהם ממנה אברהם בן שלמה כסוכנה לתביעה; מתוארך: רביעי, 26 לאדר ב' 4848 לבריאה = אביב 1088 לספירה; מיקום: אלכסנדריה
